plan_type_rationale: Single feature implementation with clear scope - getRelated() method in semantic-search.ts. No foundation docs or multi-phase work needed.
title: Implement getRelated() with Graph Integration
description: Combine semantic similarity with graph relationships (imports, calls, extends) to find related code elements. The method will use vectorStore.fetchById() to get embeddings, graph-analyzer to traverse relationships, and merge semantic + structural scores.
goal: Enable semantic search to find related code elements by combining vector similarity with structural graph relationships

dependencies_resolved: IMP-CORE-067: vectorStore.fetchById() implemented in all providers
current_state.implementation_status: Not yet implemented - requires graph integration

key_features.name: Graph Relationship Traversal
key_features.description: Use GraphAnalyzer to traverse callers, callees, dependents, and dependencies from graph.json

key_features.name: Semantic Similarity Search
key_features.description: Use vectorStore.fetchById() to retrieve embeddings and perform similarity search

key_features.name: Score Merging Algorithm
key_features.description: Combine semantic and structural scores with configurable weighting

implementation_phases.name: Implementation
implementation_phases.description: Implement getRelated() method with graph integration

tasks.title: Add graph loading infrastructure to SemanticSearchService
tasks.description: Add method to load graph.json from .coderef/ directory and initialize GraphAnalyzer
steps: READ src/integration/rag/semantic-search.ts to understand current structure
READ src/analyzer/graph-builder.ts to understand importGraphFromJSON
READ src/analyzer/graph-analyzer.ts to understand GraphAnalyzer API
EDIT SemanticSearchService constructor to accept optional graph path
ADD private method loadGraph() to load and parse graph.json
ADD private property graphAnalyzer: GraphAnalyzer | null
TEST graph loading with existing .coderef/graph.json
acceptance_criteria: Graceful handling when graph.json is missing

tasks.title: Implement structural relationship extraction
tasks.description: Use GraphAnalyzer to extract callers, callees, dependents, and dependencies for a given coderef
steps: READ src/analyzer/graph-helpers.ts to understand helper functions
ADD private method getStructuralRelationships(coderef: string, maxDepth: number)
USE GraphAnalyzer.getCallers() to find incoming calls
USE GraphAnalyzer.getCallees() to find outgoing calls
USE GraphAnalyzer.getDependents() to find dependents
USE GraphAnalyzer.getDependencies() to find dependencies
CONVERT GraphNode[] to SearchResult[] with base scores
DEDUPLICATE results across relationship types
TEST with known coderef from graph.json
acceptance_criteria: All relationship types are extracted correctly
Base structural scores are assigned (e.g., 0.8 for direct calls, 0.6 for indirect)

tasks.title: Implement semantic similarity extraction
tasks.description: Use vectorStore.fetchById() to retrieve embedding and perform similarity search
steps: READ src/integration/rag/semantic-search.ts to understand similaritySearch
ADD private method getSemanticSimilarity(coderef: string, options?: SearchOptions)
CALL vectorStore.fetchById(coderef) to get embedding
CALL this.similaritySearch(embedding, options) to get similar items
HANDLE null case when coderef not found in vector store
TEST with known coderef from vector store
acceptance_criteria: Null handling works when coderef not found

tasks.title: Implement score merging algorithm
tasks.description: Combine semantic and structural results with configurable weighting
steps: ADD private method mergeResults(semantic: SearchResult[], structural: SearchResult[], relationshipType: 'semantic' | 'structural' | 'both')
IMPLEMENT 'semantic' mode: return only semantic results
IMPLEMENT 'structural' mode: return only structural results
IMPLEMENT 'both' mode: merge and re-rank
ADD score boosting: items in both lists get score boost (e.g., +0.2)
ADD deduplication by coderef
SORT by final score descending
TEST with all three relationshipType modes
acceptance_criteria: Each mode returns correct result set
Score boosting works for overlapping items

tasks.title: Implement getRelated() method
tasks.description: Wire together all components into the main getRelated() method
steps: READ current getRelated() stub at semantic-search.ts:287-294
REPLACE stub with full implementation
CALL getStructuralRelationships() if relationshipType !== 'semantic'
CALL getSemanticSimilarity() if relationshipType !== 'structural'
CALL mergeResults() to combine results
ADD error handling for missing graph or vector store
RETURN SearchResponse with merged results
TEST with all relationshipType values
acceptance_criteria: Method no longer throws 'Not yet implemented'

tasks.title: Add unit tests for getRelated()
tasks.description: Create comprehensive unit tests for the new functionality
steps: CREATE test file: __tests__/integration/rag/semantic-search.test.ts
ADD test for semantic-only mode
ADD test for structural-only mode
ADD test for both mode with score merging
ADD test for missing graph.json handling
ADD test for missing vector store handling
ADD test for unknown coderef handling
RUN tests and ensure all pass

testing_strategy.integration_tests: Test full getRelated() flow with real graph.json and vector store

functional: getRelated() returns combined semantic and structural results
Merged results are ranked by relevance

risks.description: Graph.json may be large and slow to load
risks.mitigation: Load graph once at initialization, cache GraphAnalyzer instance

risks.description: Score merging algorithm may produce unexpected rankings
risks.mitigation: Make weighting configurable, provide clear documentation

risks.description: Coderef format mismatch between graph and vector store
risks.mitigation: Normalize coderef format before lookup, handle mismatches gracefully

superseded_reason: Feature already implemented in IMP-CORE-068 prior to workorder creation. getRelated() method fully functional with semantic/structural/both modes.
